timeline.title: Senior Nap Researcher
timeline.summary: Focus: nap optimization and treat-driven reinforcement learning.
highlights: Achieved 99.7% nap success rate across all couch positions.
Discovered that belly rubs improve nap quality by 40%.
Co-authored a paper on optimal treat distribution timing.

timeline.title: Junior Fetch Intern
highlights: Tracked 500+ squirrels using advanced sniffing algorithms.
Optimized fetch return time by 30% through tail-wagging aerodynamics.
Won Best Zoomies Award at the annual backyard symposium.

timeline.title: Treat Tester Intern
highlights: Evaluated 200+ treat varieties across taste, crunch, and smell dimensions.
Developed an internal bark-to-text system for treat requests.
